steps.title: Read the horizontal asymptote to find b
steps.content: As $x \to -\infty$, $a^x \to 0$, so $y \to b$. The graph flattens out at $y = -5$, so $b = -5$.

steps.title: Use a marked point to find a
steps.content:
The graph passes through $(1, 2)$. Substitute:
$$2 = a^1 + (-5)$$
$$a = 7$$
Check with the other marked point $(0, -4)$: $a^0 + b = 1 - 5 = -4$ ✓
